<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Watchers; use Illuminate\Queue\Events\JobFailed; use Illuminate\Queue\Events\JobProcessed; use Illuminate\Queue\Events\JobProcessing; use Illuminate\Queue\Events\JobQueued; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Event; use Spatie\LaravelRay\Payloads\JobEventPayload; use Spatie\LaravelRay\Ray; use Spatie\Ray\Settings\Settings; class JobWatcher extends Watcher { public function register(): void { $settings = app(Settings::class); $this->enabled = $settings->send_jobs_to_ray; Event::listen([ JobQueued::class, JobProcessing::class, JobProcessed::class, JobFailed::class, ], function (object $event) { if (! $this->enabled()) { return; } $payload = new JobEventPayload($event); $ray = app(Ray::class)->sendRequest($payload); optional($this->rayProxy)->applyCalledMethods($ray); }); } }
